ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weekly_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., HHS Regions) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the report */,
  "total_specimens" INTEGER /* Total number of specimens tested */,
  "total_a" INTEGER /* Total number of specimens positive for category A */,
  "total_b" INTEGER /* Total number of specimens positive for category B */,
  "percent_positive" REAL /* Percentage of positive specimens */,
  "percent_a" REAL /* Percentage of positive specimens for category A */,
  "percent_b" REAL /* Percentage of positive specimens for category B */,
  "wk_date" TEXT /* Date for the week of the report */,
  "total_positive" INTEGER /* Total number of positive specimens */,
  "age_group_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object with age group distribution of positive cases */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object with gender distribution of positive cases */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object with ethnicity distribution of positive cases */,
  "intervention_effectiveness" TEXT /* JSON object with effectiveness of interventions */,
  "forecasted_outbreak" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an outbreak is forecasted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text field for additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_reports_week FOREIGN KEY ("week") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., HHS Regions) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "health_facilities" TEXT /* JSON object with details of health facilities in the region */,
  "vaccination_rates" TEXT /* JSON object with vaccination rates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the reports are collected */,
  "epidemic_season" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is part of an epidemic season */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported in the year */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the week belongs to */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "epidemic_week" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the week is part of an epidemic */,
  "total_cases_week" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported in the week */,
  "total_deaths_week" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported in the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Description of the test method used for the category */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the test method */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the test method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weekly_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
